name: Legendary Figures

abilities.name: Demise (The Story Goes On)
abilities.text: Once per turn. When this model is killed, it may discard a card to heal 3.

keyword_actions.granted_to: Friendly Red Library models without a Summon token

actions.name: Mightier than the Sword
actions.effects: If this action kills the target, summon a Bookkeeper with 3 health in base contact with the killed model.

triggers.name: Gift of Knowledge
triggers.text: An ally within 3" gains an Insight token.

extraction_notes: Card includes decorative Asian-inspired border artwork
Features illustration of character with flowing black hair in turquoise clothing
Attack action has signature icon (sword symbol)
The 'Demise' ability is specifically for 'story Red Library models' which appears to be a subset of Red Library models
